hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$file" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.env) echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files' >&2; exit 1;; */bun.lockb|*/Cargo.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files should only change via package manager' >&2; exit 1;; */data/*.db) echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit database files directly' >&2; exit 1;; esac
file="$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) dprint fmt "$file" 2>/dev/null;; */server/*.rs) cd server && cargo fmt 2>/dev/null;; esac
